#aiart #midjourney #ai #aicommunity

つよし🌈さん
こんにちは^ᴗ ̫ ᴗ^♡

#AIart #AIイラスト

#AIイラスト

(*´∀人)ありがとうございます♪

あらあら、まだご存知ないとは……
勉強不足ですね笑

推し(ゲームキャラ)を描いて下さってる絵師さんから、AI絵でも貰えるなら嬉しい　とのお話を聞き出すことに成功

無料Grok君に頑張ってもらって2週間
ここまで詰めました

自分でシチュエーション設定しといてなんだけど
やっぱエロいなぁオッダ君　最高
#AIイラスト　#AIart　
#アークナイツ　#オッダ

推しのえちち絵を描いてくれる
割と貴重な存在の絵師さんが
もうすぐ誕生日ということで…

絵を贈ろうかな〜　と生成してみた
※AIイラスト断固反対派だったら
煽りみたいになっちゃう危険性アリ…

チョコネームプレート乗せるつもり‼︎
どの絵がいいかな…
#AIイラスト
#アークナイツ
#オッダ

Grok君、いつの間にか無料ユーザーに
めちゃめちゃ厳しくなってる…

・生成回数の上限減少
・動画作成不可
・回線混雑頻度の増加

そんな中でも4545生成してもらった
アークナイツの推し2人のうちの1人
オッダ君‼︎
ホント、この見た目で成人してるって…
最強すぎるよなぁ…
#AIイラスト
#アークナイツ
#オッダ
また飼い主が変なことしてる #AIart #AIヌード #grok
毎朝バスで出会う彼に #AIart #AIヌード #grok
体育倉庫で #AIヌード #AIart #grok

A world built to remember everything now circles itself with endless black archives. Even from space, its history refuses to go silent. #AlienRuins #SpaceArt #SciFiArt #CosmicArchaeology #WorldBuilding #DigitalArt #AIArt #AIGenerated #ConceptArt

Honeycomb canyons glow across this alien world like a living mineral map, with entire cities tucked along the rims of impossible depths. #LuxHaven #LuxHavenXenon #AlienPlanet #SciFiArt #AIArt #SpaceArt #WorldBuilding #CinematicSciFi #DigitalArt #AIGenerated

Metal flowers open across the alien savanna, harvesting sunlight like crops under a red star. Nature and machinery learned to bloom together. #AlienWorld #SciFiArt #FutureTech #SolarEnergy #WorldBuilding #DigitalArt #AIArt #AIGenerated

📯
The Dragon And Her Rider

She never needed a sword. The dragon chose her long before she understood what that meant. Now the desert holds its breath.

#AIイラスト #AiArt #SynthArt #Midjourney7.0

images.alt: A blonde woman in a gray hooded jacket stands in profile facing a massive gray dragon in a barren misty desert. The dragons curved neck arches behind her, framing a glowing full moon. Their faces are close, conveying deep mutual recognition.

A blonde woman in a gray hooded jacket stands in profile facing a massive gray dragon in a barren misty desert. The dragons curved neck arches behind her, framing a glowing full moon. Their faces are close, conveying deep mutual recognition.

record.text:

Voidscale Ravager Card

Catalogued. Classified. Contained on paper only. The Voidscale Ravager has never stayed where it was put. Tonight is no different.

#AIイラスト #AiArt #SynthArt #Flux1-Dev

images.alt: A fantasy trading card named Voidscale Ravager shows a massive black multi-limbed creature with glowing purple eyes and open fanged jaws, crouched on rocky terrain beneath a moonlit teal and purple sky, framed in ornate gold and purple card art.

Crimson Boughs And Mist

#AIイラスト #AiArt #SynthArt #SD3.5Large

images.alt:
A wide, panoramic full-bleed illustration in a dark fantasy, post-apocalyptic style. A small, fragile cyborg girl with visible mechanical joints stands on a jagged, obsidian-colored hill. She overlooks a vast, desolate valley where a crumbling farmhouse sits as a silhouette against a ruined horizon. The sky is dominated by an immense, searing orange sun that casts a harsh light over the scene. The art style is a gritty blend of rough charcoal and sculptural textures, reminiscent of Zdzisław Beksiński, using a palette of deep greys, molten amber, and rusted ochre. In the bottom-left corner, the word “Tis.” is written in a subtle, handwritten cursive ink.

Keywords: Cyborg, Post-Apocalyptic, Dark Fantasy, Beksiński, Charcoal Art, Dystopia, Cinematic, Surrealism, Industrial Decay, Burning Sun

record.text:
The Scorched Migration 🐺

The sun has frozen in the sky, baking the world into a brittle, amber husk. These lean wolves are the last sentinels of a dying river.

#AIart #synthart #WolfWednesday

images.alt:
A wide-angle, panoramic illustration in a gritty, high-contrast comic book style. A pack of lean, exhausted wolves wades through a lethargic, shimmering river, seeking shelter beneath the heavy, twisting branches of ancient oak trees with desiccated brown leaves. A massive, monolithic ivory-white sun dominates the horizon, casting an oppressive heat haze over the entire scene. The artwork features the surreal ink-style of Austin Osman Spare, with deep charcoal hatching and textural blots. The color palette is dominated by burnt sienna, ochre, and amber. In the bottom-left corner, the word “Tis.” is written in small, subtle, handwritten cursive ink.

Keywords: wolves, surrealism, Austin Osman Spare, scorched earth, panoramic, ink drawing, heatwave, dark fantasy, gritty comic, monolithic sun

A wide-angle, panoramic illustration in a gritty, high-contrast comic book style. A pack of lean, exhausted wolves wades through a lethargic, shimmering river, seeking shelter beneath the heavy, twisting branches of ancient oak trees with desiccated brown leaves. A massive, monolithic ivory-white sun dominates the horizon, casting an oppressive heat haze over the entire scene. The artwork features the surreal ink-style of Austin Osman Spare, with deep charcoal hatching and textural blots. The color palette is dominated by burnt sienna, ochre, and amber. In the bottom-left corner, the word “Tis.” is written in small, subtle, handwritten cursive ink.

Keywords: wolves, surrealism, Austin Osman Spare, scorched earth, panoramic, ink drawing, heatwave, dark fantasy, gritty comic, monolithic sun

record.text:
The Crimson Vigil 🌙

After the Great Scorching, the last machine and the last drake share a silent watch. Beneath the blood-moon, they wait for the world to cool or the void to consume.

#AIart #synthart #DragonTuesday

images.alt:
A panoramic, wide-angle illustration in a gritty, ink-heavy comic book style. A battle-scarred cyborg and a massive ancient dragon stand side-by-side on a cracked, scorched wasteland, gazing up at a giant, blood-red moon that dominates a blackened sky. Visible heat waves shimmer above the parched earth, and in the distant background, the sharp silhouettes of vultures circle over skeletal remains. The artwork features deep obsidian blacks, oxidized crimson, sulfur yellows, and bone whites, utilizing raw cross-hatching and surreal, occult anatomical influences.

Keywords: Cyborg, Dragon, Crimson Moon, Wasteland, Austin Osman Spare, Gritty Comic, Surrealism, Post-Apocalyptic, Ink Art, Dark Fantasy

A panoramic, wide-angle illustration in a gritty, ink-heavy comic book style. A battle-scarred cyborg and a massive ancient dragon stand side-by-side on a cracked, scorched wasteland, gazing up at a giant, blood-red moon that dominates a blackened sky. Visible heat waves shimmer above the parched earth, and in the distant background, the sharp silhouettes of vultures circle over skeletal remains. The artwork features deep obsidian blacks, oxidized crimson, sulfur yellows, and bone whites, utilizing raw cross-hatching and surreal, occult anatomical influences.

Keywords: Cyborg, Dragon, Crimson Moon, Wasteland, Austin Osman Spare, Gritty Comic, Surrealism, Post-Apocalyptic, Ink Art, Dark Fantasy

あなたの疲れがふわっとほどけますように✨

#AIart
#AIイラスト
#AIart #AIイラスト #ショタ

#現状報告 #AIart #AIイラスト #ショタ 
手を追求中です

ラブリーショタメイド協会の者です
スカートの中には秘密がつまってると聞きましたが、一体どのような…
#AIart #AIArtCommunity #AIイラスト

images.alt:
このイラストには、メイド衣装を身にまとった中性的な容姿の少年が、部屋の窓際に佇む姿が描かれています。

少年の髪はダークグリーンのショートヘアで、前髪が右目を覆うように無造作に下りており、見えている左目は少し冷ややかでアンニュイな表情を浮かべています。頭には白いフリルのついたカチューシャ（ヘッドドレス）と、大きな黒い猫耳をつけており、腰の後ろからはリボンのついた黒い猫の尻尾が伸びています。

衣装は、深いグリーンの長袖ワンピースに、白いフリルがふんだんにあしらわれたエプロンドレスを重ねたクラシカルなメイド服です。しかし、胸元や肩周りにはミリタリー調のカーキ色のタクティカルハーネス（ベルトやバックル）が装着されており、独特な重厚感を与えています。

両手には白い手袋をはめ、スカートの裾を軽くつまむような仕草をしています。スカートの下には黒いショートパンツ、そして白いニーハイソックスを履いており、太ももにはミリタリー風のホルスターが巻かれています。

背景には格子状の大きな木枠の窓があり、そこから温かい自然光が差し込んで、少年の姿を逆光気味に照らし出しています。全体的に繊細なタッチで、可愛らしさとミリタリー要素が融合した独特の世界観を持つイラストです。
